description: Composition Wine colored round neck long top with short ruched sleeves, made of 100% viscose, metallic embellishments on the centre of the chest, and a peep back Fitting Regular Wash care Machine/hand wash separately in mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Dry in shade Medium iron When you're in the mood for some sophisticated, unadulterated fun, this long top from jealous 21 will fulfill your heart's desire with elan. The viscose fabric guarantees a great comfortable Fit, and the metallic embellishments add subtle spark to this understated top. Pair it with skinny jeans and silver heels for a fun-filled night. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-5.7", Chest-33"
